\tzpentry{ID4155}{Quantum Chemical Potential Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4155 introduces Quantum Chemical Potential Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff}(t) = \boldsymbol{\mu}_1 + \boldsymbol{\mu}_2 + \frac{\hbar}{2m_e c} \frac{\nabla \times (\boldsymbol{\mu}_1 \times \boldsymbol{\mu}_2)}{4\pi \varepsilon_0 c^2 d(t)^3} \end{equation}
